BGLAM Liquid Builder Gel 15ml | LD035
products.body_html:
BGLAM Liquid Builder Gel 15ml is a professional-grade, self-leveling builder gel, HEMA-free and TPO-free, suitable for three nail techniques:

  • Overlay: Applied directly onto the natural nail to strengthen and protect without adding length.
  • Extension on tips: Used over plastic tips to build and extend the nail before shaping and filing.
  • Extension on dual forms: Applied into a dual form mold to sculpt a full nail extension in one step, cured, then the mold is removed.

Its self-leveling formula ensures a smooth, even surface with minimal effort. The high-gloss finish requires no buffing before top coat application.

  • Volume: 15ml
  • Formula: HEMA-free · TPO-free
  • Finish: High-gloss, self-leveling
  • Compatibility: UV/LED lamps

Available in multiple shades - select your colour from the variant selector above.

Tungsten Carbide Nail Drill Bit
products.body_html:
High-performance nail drill bit for precise and smooth work. Designed for professional nail technicians and advanced users, this tungsten carbide bit efficiently removes gel, acrylic, and nail enhancements while keeping the natural nail protected.

  • Durable Tungsten Carbide: Long-lasting, heat-resistant, and ideal for heavy-duty use.
  • Multiple Grit Options: Available in fine, medium, and coarse levels (identified by color ring).
  • Universal Fit: 3/32" shank compatible with most professional electric nail drills.
  • Precision Cutting: Cross-cut design ensures smooth filing and fast removal without vibration.
  • Easy to Clean: Disinfectable and reusable, maintaining top hygiene standards.

How to use:
Insert the bit into your nail drill, adjust speed according to task, and use gentle, even movements to shape or remove product.

products.title: Reusable Manicure Guard | 26PCS
products.body_html:
Apply nail polish neatly and effortlessly. These nail polish protector clips are designed to prevent polish overflow and keep your cuticles clean while painting. Perfect for beginners and professionals who want a flawless manicure every time.
  • Mess-Free Application: Prevents polish from spreading onto skin or cuticles.
  • Adjustable Fit: Includes 26 pieces in 10 different sizes to fit all finger shapes.
  • Reusable & Durable: Made from flexible, high-quality silicone for long-lasting use.
  • Easy to Use: Simply clip on before applying polish and remove once dry.
  • Professional Finish: Achieve clean, salon-style manicures at home with zero cleanup.

How to use:
Choose the correct size for each finger, clip the guard around your nail, apply polish, and remove once finished for a perfect edge.

Package Includes: 26 reusable nail polish protector clips in assorted sizes.

products.title: 3D Nail Art Flower Decoration Kit | 12 Colors Floral Nail Art Set
products.body_html:
Create stunning floral nail designs effortlessly. This 3D nail flower decoration set includes 12 vibrant colors of delicate resin flowers and micro beads, allowing you to achieve professional, eye-catching nail art. Perfect for gel, acrylic, or natural nails.
  • Beautiful Color Variety: 12 shades including pink, blue, purple, white, black, red, yellow, and more.
  • 3D Floral Design: Adds depth and texture to any manicure for a unique, elegant finish.
  • Easy to Apply: Use with nail glue, gel, or top coat for long-lasting results.
  • Safe Material: Lightweight resin flowers with metallic beads – non-toxic and skin-friendly.
  • Perfect for Creativity: Great for nail salons or DIY nail art lovers.

How to use:
Apply a thin layer of gel or glue, place the flowers using tweezers, add beads for extra shine, and seal with a top coat.

Package Includes: 1 x 12-grid box of colorful 3D nail art flowers with micro beads.

products.title: Nail Art Steel Caviar Beads | Gold, Rose Gold & Silver
Nail Art Steel Bead Series | 6 different sizes
products.body_html:
Add a touch of elegance to your nail designs. This nail art steel bead set includes multiple metallic shades that bring dimension and shine to any manicure. Perfect for 3D nail art, gel nails, or resin crafts, these beads elevate every look from simple to stunning.
  • High-Quality Steel Beads: Smooth, durable, and rust-resistant for long-lasting shine.
  • Multi-Color Variety: Includes gold, silver, rose gold, and black tones, ideal for all nail styles.
  • Perfect Size Range: Various bead diameters to suit both minimal and bold designs.
  • Easy to Apply: Can be embedded in gel, acrylic, or nail glue for secure hold.
  • Professional Finish: Suitable for salon or at-home nail art lovers.

How to use:
Apply a small amount of gel or glue where desired, place the beads using tweezers or a dotting tool, and cure or seal with top coat for lasting results.

Package Includes: 4 boxes of metallic nail beads in assorted colors and sizes.

products.title: Eyelash Applicator Tool | Professional Lash Tweezers with Comb Tip
products.body_html:
Achieve a flawless lash application every time. These ergonomic eyelash applicator tweezers are designed for precision and comfort, helping you apply, adjust, and blend false lashes with ease. The built-in comb tip separates lashes gently for a natural finish.
  • 2-in-1 Design: Combines tweezers and lash comb for smooth, precise application.
  • Ergonomic Grip: Curved handle provides better control and comfort.
  • Durable & Lightweight: Made from premium stainless steel with anti-slip finish.
  • Safe & Easy to Use: Perfect for both beginners and professionals.
  • Multiple Colors: Available in gold, rose gold, black, silver, and gradient blue-pink.

How to use:
Use the curved tip to pick up and apply false lashes close to the lash line. After placement, gently press and comb through for a seamless blend.

products.title: Neck and Shoulder Massager Roller | Manual Muscle Relaxation Tool
products.body_html:
Relieve tension and stress instantly. This dual-roller neck and shoulder massager provides deep tissue pressure to help ease stiffness, fatigue, and pain. Its ergonomic handle design lets you control the pressure and target sore spots effectively.
  • Effective Muscle Relief: Dual textured rollers simulate a professional massage to release knots and improve blood circulation.
  • Ergonomic Design: Lightweight and easy to handle – ideal for neck, shoulders, back, and legs.
  • Custom Pressure Control: Adjust intensity by simply squeezing the handles.
  • Portable and Durable: Made from high-quality, skin-friendly materials – perfect for home, office, or travel.
  • Relax Anytime: No batteries or power needed – your relaxation tool is always ready.

How to use:
Place the rollers around your neck, gently squeeze the handles, and move up and down along the muscles to relieve tension.

products.title: French Nail Tips 150PCS | YS-513
products.body_html:
Get a flawless French manicure in minutes! Our 150-piece French nail tips set combines professional quality with effortless beauty. Designed for both beginners and nail experts, these pre-shaped pink-and-white tips give a natural, salon-perfect look every time.
  • Premium Quality: Made from durable, high-grade ABS material for a lightweight and comfortable fit.
  • Natural Finish: Soft pink base and crisp white tip for a timeless French manicure style.
  • Easy to Apply: Works perfectly with nail glue, gel, or acrylic systems.
  • 150 Pieces: Comes in 10 different sizes to fit all nail shapes.
  • Professional Results: Suitable for salons and home users seeking perfect nails instantly.

How to use:
Select the correct size, apply glue, press for a few seconds, then file and finish with a top coat or gel for extra shine.

Package Includes: 150PCS Pre-shaped French Nail Tips in a reusable storage box.

products.title: Fined Tip Small Scissors Curved
Nail Drill Mandrel for Sanding Band Holder | 6mm Diameter
products.body_html:
Professional mandrel bit designed to securely hold sanding bands on electric nail drills. The knurled metal barrel ensures a tight fit and smooth, stable performance for manicures and pedicures.

Key Features

  • Standard 3/32" (2.35 mm) shank – fits most nail drills
  • Knurled barrel for superior grip on sanding bands
  • Durable stainless/chrome-plated steel body
  • Quick change between grits (80/120/180/240…)
  • Easy to clean and disinfect

Best For

  • Cuticle area prep (with fine grits)
  • Surface refinement & product removal
  • Callus smoothing (pedi – coarse grits)

How to Use

  1. Insert the mandrel into your drill handpiece (lock it).
  2. Slide a sanding band fully onto the barrel.
  3. Set a safe speed (start low, increase as needed).
  4. Work with light pressure; replace bands when worn.

Care & Hygiene

  • Remove sanding band before cleaning.
  • Wash the mandrel, then disinfect according to salon protocol.
  • Dry thoroughly to prevent corrosion.

Specs

  • Shank: 3/32" (2.35 mm)
  • Barrel: knurled metal cylinder
  • Material: stainless/chrome-plated steel
  • Compatibility: universal sanding bands

products.title: 5-in-1 Tungsten Carbide Nail Drill Bit
products.body_html:
Professional 5-in-1 design: This high-performance tungsten carbide bit features five functions in one tool. It includes rounded teeth at the top and three types of teeth along the body (fine, medium, and coarse) for a smooth and progressive transition.

  • Material: Premium tungsten carbide
  • 5-in-1 multi-functional head with rounded tip
  • Fine teeth on the top, medium in the middle, coarse at the bottom
  • Removes gel, acrylic, and excess product efficiently
  • Suitable for both right-handed and left-handed users
  • 3/32" shank fits all standard nail drills
  • Durable, rust-resistant, and easy to clean

Use: For gel removal, nail surface cleaning, shape refining, and cuticle smoothing.
Material: Tungsten Carbide | Shank Size: 3/32" (2.35 mm)

BF Cysteamine-Based Lifting Lotion 1 | 1 g Pouch
products.body_html:
This specially formulated solution gently lifts natural lashes from the base, creating a beautiful upward curl. It works by softening and reshaping the hair’s bonds to achieve a long-lasting lift.

During this step, lashes are carefully brushed onto a silicone pad to ensure they take on the desired shape.

Cysteamine-based lifting is often referred to as an "organic" or "plant-based" lash lift system. Results can last between 4 to 8 weeks.

products.title: BF Lift Glue 5 ml | Normal
products.body_html:
Lift Glue is a gentle adhesive used to secure the silicone lash lift pad to the eyelid and to hold natural lashes in place on the shield during the lash lifting process.

Free from cyanoacrylate, making it ideal for sensitive clients.

products.title: BF Concentrated Lash & Brown Serum with mascara brush 5 ml
products.body_html:
This concentrated serum features a powerful blend of ingredients including Biotin, Collagen, Keratin, Protein, Panthenol, and Arginine.

It supports natural lash growth and helps repair damaged lashes.

Suitable for use on both lifted and natural lashes, and can also be applied to eyebrows.

Color: Black
Drying Time: 1–2 sec
Retention: 3–4 weeks
Ideal Temperature: 20–25°C

Sensitive line. Non-PMMA. Latex-Free.

It applies easily without slipping and stays in place throughout the procedure.

Infused with sweet strawberry and elegant rose scents for a pleasant experience.

products.title: Electric Leather Recliner Chair | No rotate | Massage Function | Black
products.body_html:
Experience true relaxation with this premium massage recliner chair. Designed for deep comfort, it features plush cushioning, pillow-top arms, and a smooth side-lever recline. This model comes with integrated vibration massage for your back and legs, while being fixed in place (no rotation) for extra stability.

  • No rotate, with massage, stable base with soothing vibration
  • Manual recline with pop-up footrest via easy side lever
  • Ergonomic backrest for natural spinal support
  • Soft-touch, durable upholstery in modern grey
  • Quiet & sturdy mechanism for everyday use

Perfect for relaxing at home, in beauty salons, or in office lounges. This recliner combines style, comfort, and massage in one.

products.title: Electric Leather Recliner Chair | Rotate | Massage Function | Orange
products.body_html:
Sink into comfort with a power recliner that rotates, massages and looks stunning in warm orange upholstery.
  • Power Recline: one-touch button smoothly adjusts the backrest and footrest.
  • Swivel Base: 360° rotation for easy conversation and perfect TV angles.
  • Massage Function: multiple vibration points (back, lumbar, seat) with selectable modes.
  • Pillow-top Comfort: overstuffed headrest, armrests and seat for all-day lounging.
  • Easy-care Upholstery: leather-look PU that’s soft, durable and simple to wipe clean.
  • Sturdy Build: steel reclining mechanism and solid frame for daily use.

Suggested Uses

Living room, salon waiting area, gaming nook, home office break corner.

Specifications

  • Upholstery: PU leather (orange)
  • Functions: electric recline, 360° swivel, vibration massage
  • Power: AC adapter included
  • Dimensions (approx.): W 90 cm × D 95 cm × H 105 cm (seated)
  • Reclined depth (approx.): 160 cm
  • Assembly: tool-free backrest slide-in; plug & play

What’s in the Box

  • Recliner chair (seat + backrest)
  • Power adapter & cable

Care

Wipe with a soft damp cloth; avoid harsh solvents and direct sunlight exposure.

Note: Measurements are approximate and may vary slightly due to manual assembly.
